title: Affordable event venue hire in aid of veteran soldiers
description: GEORGE NEWS - If you're looking for a...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - If you're looking for a function, meeting, or training venue, the Memorable Order of Tin Hats (Moths) offers an excellent facility at Loerie Park, available for hire at very competitive rates.


> All proceeds go directly toward supporting the Moths and their ongoing efforts in the community and among veterans.


The hall can comfortably accommodate up to 80 people and comes equipped with crockery, cutlery, tables, chairs, a fully functional kitchen, and an undercover braai area.

It also features a public address system along with a permanently installed projector and screen, making it suitable for a wide range of events.

There is ample secure parking available on-site, ensuring convenience and peace of mind for guests.

While private alcohol consumption is not allowed, the venue includes a well-stocked and reasonably priced bar run by Shellhole members, which must be used during events.


> For further information or to make a booking, contact Johan Viljoen at [email protected].


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
